problem_text_cn: 半径$R$的光滑绝缘圆环固定在水平面，环内有均匀带电细杆$ab$（质量$m$、电量$Q$，杆中心距环心$R/2$，两端约束在环上）。$t=0$时杆静止，磁场$B=B_0\sin\omega_0 t$竖直向下变化，杆交替逆时针、顺时针转$2\pi$角。1. 确定$\omega_0$与$m$、$Q$、$B_0$的关系；2. 确定杆通过$a$、$b$端对环的作用力$N_a$、$N_b$随$t$的变化规律。
problem_text_en: A smooth insulating ring of radius $R$ is fixed on a horizontal plane. There is a uniformly charged thin rod $ab$ inside the ring（mass $m$、charge $Q$，the distance from the rod center to the ring center is $R/2$，both ends are constrained on the ring）. The rod is at rest at $t=0$，the magnetic field $B=B_0\sin\omega_0 t$ changes vertically downward，and the rod rotates $2\pi$ angles counterclockwise and clockwise alternately. 1. Determine the relationship between $\omega_0$ and $m$、$Q$、$B_0$；2. Determine the variation law of the forces $N_a$、$N_b$ exerted by the rod on the ring through ends $a$ and $b$ with $t$.
problem_solution_cn:
（1）$\omega_0$的确定：
- 变化磁场产生涡旋电场$E=(1/2)B_0\omega_0\cos\omega_0 t · r$，杆受涡旋电场力矩$M=Q B_0\omega_0 D^2 \cos\omega_0 t$（$D=R/2$）。
- 转动惯量$I=2mD^2$，由转动定理得$\beta=Q B_0\omega_0 \cos\omega_0 t/(2m)$，积分得转角$\theta=Q B_0(1 - \cos\omega_0 t)/(2m\omega_0)$。
- 题设$\theta_{max}=2\pi$，故$Q B_0/(2m\omega_0)=2\pi$，解得$\omega_0=Q B_0/(4\pi m)$。
（2）作用力$N_a$、$N_b$：
- 洛伦兹力提供向心力，环的作用力$N_a=Q^2 B_0^2 R \sin^2\omega_0 t/(8m)$，$N_b=-N_a$。
problem_solution_en:
（1）Determination of $\omega_0$：
- The varying magnetic field generates an eddy electric field $E=(1/2)B_0\omega_0\cos\omega_0 t · r$，the rod is subjected to an eddy electric field torque $M=Q B_0\omega_0 D^2 \cos\omega_0 t$（$D=R/2$）。
- Moment of inertia $I=2mD^2$，from the rotation theorem $\beta=Q B_0\omega_0 \cos\omega_0 t/(2m)$，integrating gives the rotation angle $\theta=Q B_0(1 - \cos\omega_0 t)/(2m\omega_0)$。
- Given $\theta_{max}=2\pi$，so $Q B_0/(2m\omega_0)=2\pi$，solving gives $\omega_0=Q B_0/(4\pi m)$。
（2）Forces $N_a$、$N_b$：
- The Lorentz force provides the centripetal force，the force exerted by the ring $N_a=Q^2 B_0^2 R \sin^2\omega_0 t/(8m)$，$N_b=-N_a$。
problem_answer: 1. $\omega_0$与$m$、$Q$、$B_0$的关系$\omega_0=\frac{Q B_0}{4\pi m}$；2. 作用力$N_a=\frac{Q^2 B_0^2 R}{8m} \sin^2\omega_0 t$，$N_b=-\frac{Q^2 B_0^2 R}{8m} \sin^2\omega_0 t$
